page_metadata.biotools__summary: Profeel is an open-source dosimetry data visualization software (MATLAB®), which can be used for 1D, 2D and 3D data comparison, data processing and analytics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Profeel is an open-source dosimetry data visualization software (MATLAB®), which can be used for 1D, 2D and 3D data comparison, data processing and analytics.
